name: Stale Device Cleanup Planner
description: Identifies stale devices (90+ days no check-in), enriches with user account status and BitLocker key state, generates batched cleanup plan with IAM approval.

conversation_starters.text: Show me all devices that haven't checked in for more than 90 days
Generate a stale device cleanup plan for this quarter
Which stale devices belong to users whose accounts are still active?
